parameters: The boat I was on was currently proceeding toward the floating island
paradise of the south, known far and wide as a romantic resort.
I took out my tablet to confirm my location with the map app.
I thought I'd be able to see it by now.
I squinted my eyes and caught the faint outline of an island ahead.
The closer we got, the clearer it became.
It's been five years since I last sailed to this island, huh? I never thought
I'd be coming back for a reason like this.
I muttered to myself as I gazed at the island.
Five years ago, my parents moved to the big city for their jobs.
My childhood friend, who was almost done with school now, called me
The island was filled with leisure facilities, offering picturesque beaches,
marine sports, hot springs, and other water attractions.
On top of that, it was famous in other circles for its nude beaches,
health spas, love hotels, and other sex businesses.
Thanks to its twofold splendor, the island was a major
However, tourism had majorly declined since I left.
According to my childhood friend, the cause was a new phenomenon
A few months ago the island was full of tourists, but after a certain day,
people began collapsing one after another.
Since nobody could figure out the specific reason, people eventually
My childhood friend's solution was to ask me to come back as a transfer
As we landed, nostalgic scenery spread out before my eyes.
We played around here all the time as kids.
A single girl greeted me in the harbor.
Her name was Mikoto Kannagi. She was the childhood friend I grew up
The moment she caught sight of me, her face lit up and she ran over.
I haven't seen you in forever! How've you been?
skit しゃがみジャンプ mikoto t
skit しゃがみジャンプ mikoto t
skit しゃがみジャンプ mikoto t
She grabbed my hand and shook it vigorously. She was as cheerful as
ever, and I felt the same joy at our reunion.
We were neighbors as kids, so we played together a lot.
Glad to hear it! Here I thought you might've forgotten me.
Don't be silly. How could I forget anyone as loud as you?
When I teased her, she puffed her cheeks, pretending to be mad.
I couldn't help laughing at the sight.
She punched my shoulder weakly enough that it didn't even hurt.
By the way, are you still helping out at your parents' shrine?
skit うなづき mikoto t
She came from a long and storied line.
She was raised to be a great shrine maiden, and she'd lived up to
Incidentally, her parents were priests who managed the shrine they
lived in. Mikoto dealt with a lot of the pilgrims.
Her face looked a little sad.
We haven't been getting many visitors recently because of the incidents.
People's vigor being sucked away affected her too.
I looked down to ponder it, but she interrupted me, cheerful
Enough of that now! We've gotta go to school or we'll be late!
skit しゃがみジャンプ mikoto t
She pushed my back, urging me onward. I could do nothing but
メッセージ内容 = \I[930]Go to school.
I walked up to an empty classroom, hearing noises from inside.
選択肢リスト = ["{\"label\":\"開けてみる\",\"switchId\":\"\…
No, there was no way it was my imagination.
I decided to open the door and check what was going on.
The door clicked as it opened, revealing Mikoto changing inside.
Her white blouse was completely discarded, and she still had her skirt
Her gracefully bouncing chest, her alabaster skin, her narrow but curvy
waist, and her thick thighs all took my breath away.
On top of that, her frilly pink underwear made her look even
There were no traces left of her previously young, immature body. I was
enchanted by the fully bloomed woman I saw before me.
It was clearly wrong of me to look, so I tried to turn my eyes away,
but I couldn't. They were glued to her body.
As I stared, she realized what was happening, and her face turned pink.
Hey, it's embarrassing when you stare.
Being called out finally brought me back to myself.
Sorry! I didn't do it on purpose!
I moved to leave and close the door, but noticing a classmate walking
around the corner, I walked inside the room and closed it after.
She was freaking out, but we had a greater enemy.
Only once our classmate walked by did I feel relieved.
But if that classmate saw us, there would definitely be rumors.
Mikoto opened her mouth as I was thinking through possible outcomes.
I mean, I guess you can stay here for a little while, but would you at
She squirmed bashfully as she made her request. How could I refuse
As asked, I turned to face the wall behind me. Hearing the sounds of
rustling clothes behind me made my heart race even faster, somehow.
When I turned back to face her, she was wearing her uniform like normal.
Yup. All's well that ends well.
Why were you changing here, anyway?
My rude question was tough for her to answer, but she eventually gave
We promised to go home together, remember? I wanted to change out
Her response made me aware of something.
(Huh? Does that mean she's interested in me?)
I felt my cheeks getting hotter as I thought about it, but I somehow
managed to keep a straight face.
Let's keep what happened our secret, okay?
The way she put her index finger to her lips was so charming that I felt
skit うなづき mikoto t
She gave me a cheerful nod and we left school behind.
I managed to avoid the worst possible outcome: being late on my
After introducing myself to my classmates, I took my lessons, and got a
tour of the school. Time passed in the blink of an eye.
A few of my new classmates talked to me, so I wasn't being ostracized.
And now it was break time.
I found Mikoto at the center of a large group of students, all of whom
I didn't think about it when we were younger, but she was pretty too.
Her beautiful brown hair reached down to her hips, her face was
perfectly symmetrical, and she had a great figure.
On top of that, she was fun to be around. Who wouldn't want to
I thought about how she was practically flawless as I stared at her.

When she noticed me looking, she gave me a wave and walked over.
A few people glared at me for stealing her away, but I didn't mind.
I was a newcomer and a transfer student, after all.
Plus, she was popular with both the girls and the guys.
Though I was fitting in, it wasn't like I'd made real friends yet.
All those thoughts passed through my mind as she walked up to me.

Hey, you were looking at me, right? Did I steal your heart
It was basically true, so I saw no reason to deny it.
First she smiled at my response, then her cheeks reddened.
Whoa! You can't just tell a girl that!!
Watching her panic was funny, so I laughed at her.
It felt like she was the same as ever.
I stroked her hair and she calmed down.
After I stroked her hair for a while, she half-closed her eyes with bliss.
Watching her felt like it healed my heart too.
The bell rang, so she returned to her seat.
But halfway there, she stopped and turned back.
Hey, do you wanna walk home with me today?
My heart skipped a beat when she looked up into eyes.
I had to put an effort into acting normal as I replied.
I answered instantly, so she gave me a satisfied smile and sat down.
School ended in no time. I cleaned up my textbooks,
However, I searched the entire classroom and still failed to find her.
I took a closer look at her desk.
That was my first thought, so I decided to wait, but she showed no
Once a full ten minutes past, I really started to worry about her.
Figuring something might've happened, I left the classroom on a mission
It sure has been a while since we walked home together.
Yeah, how long ago was that? Grade school, maybe?
Huh, it's been that long? Now I'm feeling all nostalgic.

Wow, I bet we look just like boyfriend and girlfriend to anyone who

We walked silently for a while before she opened her mouth.
Ehehe, this is making me blush.

After that, we made small talk, mostly about school, but my heart rate
She was apparently working there today.
At the top of the stone steps, I saw a massive red torii gate.
There were old-fashioned lanterns on both sides. At night, the light they
gave off created a beautiful fantasy realm.
The cobblestone path continued to the main shrine, which gave off an air
of divinity as a worshiper brought their hands together in prayer.
Thanks for escorting me home. Wanna stay a while?
Sure, if I won't be intruding.
Visiting the shrine again filled me with nostalgia too.
I have to change, so wait for me!

I finally came back to myself and made eye contact.

We put a donation in the offering box, bowed twice, clapped twice,
bowed once, prayed, and closed our eyes together.
Once I finished praying, I opened my eyes to see she was still praying.
I thought of a few possible options by the time she finished with her
prayers and made eye contact with me.
I was so curious that I decided to ask.
She had a strange look on her face as she answered.
I asked for life to return to the island.
I figured. That strange phenomenon is still going on, huh?
Would you mind explaining exactly why you summoned me?
How much do you know about the life force draining phenomenon?
Only what you told me. Residents of the island and tourists have been
She looked at me seriously and started giving a thorough explanation.
アニメーションタイプ = def
It all started about a year ago.
A small number of individuals were found to have no lust or vitality left.
Eventually, the number of victims grew.
We thought it was a spreading cold or something at first, but no doctor
could identify any cause, and no treatments had any effect.
Eventually, a rumor started spreading that something from the island's
history was draining people's life force.
Over time, the number of tourists fell more and more. Even our most
popular attractions, the nude beaches, love hotels, and spas, found
Our island flourished based on the sex industry, so this is a major
financial hit. The residents are struggling to get by, and I wouldn't be
surprised if we found ourselves facing depopulation.
I was starting to get a better idea of the full picture.
That's why I've been helping Dad investigate.
Her father was a priest who managed the shrine. He always treated me
Their family had managed this shrine through the generations, so it
would make sense if he knew something.
Not long before you came, we finally figured out a clue!
According to ancient records, powerful monsters were once sealed here,
and those monsters had the power to drain people's life force.
We think something might've broken the seal.
She took out a scroll to show me.
"Powerful monsters known as succubi have been sealed upon this island
These succubi are mystical creatures that drain humans' life force and
They have the power to possess human women, manipulating those
women's minds and bodies to fulfill their desires.
Only those of the honorable lineage may defeat the monsters.
They possess a special power that allows them to seal the succubi's
When the seal is broken and succubi menace the island again, its
Follow the ancient teachings. Guard the seal, and never allow the succubi
This was one of the scrolls in the shrine's archives. The lineage it talks
Once she explained, I asked her a question.
So only a Kannagi shrine maiden can beat these monsters?
She took a deep breath and looked at me seriously.
As the only shrine maiden, I must fight to save the island.
The determination in her gaze showed how strong her will was, but also
how much she was forcing herself.
Will you be okay? Fighting against strange monsters alone
That's why I sent word to you. I was a little surprised you actually came
She looked bashful as she spoke.
You've always been a great friend.
Obviously. We grew up together. How could I not come help you when
Her smile turned into a full grin.
You've always had a strong sixth sense.
Right. I saw a lot of spirits when I was younger.
You can sense the monsters and other evil presences that I'm incapable
of detecting. I'd like you to support me in battle.
Though she still smiled, her eyes were completely serious.
It felt like my answer would determine the course of her battle.
After mustering my courage, I nodded.
Of course I'll help you. You're my most important friend, after all.
Hearing those words, she finally relaxed.
Thank you. I'm sure the two of us can overcome any trial together.
That was how we decided to fight the monsters as a team.
After that, I helped around the shrine a little before heading out.
Sorry you had to help out so much. I really appreciate it.
Nah, it wasn't a big deal. I had fun.
Anyways, it's getting dark. I'll escort you.
Thanks. I'll take you up on that.
We began walking away from the shrine, only to notice the skies
darkening, instantly ruining the previously sunny day.
Worse yet, the darkness was being caused by mystical fog rather than
Mikoto stopped in place and scowled.
We've been getting this weather from time to time since the island's
change, and I feel like it's gotten more frequent over time.
I held her hand and lightly squeezed it to reassure her.
Relieved by my words, she smiled, nodded, and resumed walking.
